---
title: "Chart of the month"
format: html
---

Each month, we nominate and vote for a chart of month, based on

- Impact
- Novelty
- Clarity
- Aesthetics
- Impact
- General love


Here's a few examples of charts that we have loved in the past:

:::: {.carousel .dark .framed indicators="true" controls="true"}

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart1.png" height="400px" caption="ONS Surveys"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart2.png" caption="Long Term International Migration"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart3.png" caption="UK trade"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart4.png" caption="Ownership of UK quoted shares"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart5.png" caption="Deaths related to drug poisoning in England and Wales"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart6.png" caption="Marriages and Divorces in England and Wales"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2025_dec_chart7.png" caption="GDP monthly estimate, UK"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2026_jan_chart1.png" caption="Gender pay gap in the UK: 2025"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2026_jan_chart2.png" caption="Industry-to-industry payment flows, UK: 2019 to 2025"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2026_jan_chart3.png" caption="Industry-to-industry payment flows, UK: 2019 to 2025"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/2026_jan_chart4.png" caption="UK trade flows of containerised products through global maritime passages: 2020 to 2024"}
:::



:::

<div id="footer">
You can contact us at [digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk](mailto:digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk) and we will set up a consultation to see how we can best support you.</div>
